title: sphaeropteris squamulata
intro: Sphaeropteris squamulata, also known as the Rough Scaled Tree Fern, is a species of tree fern native to New Caledonia. It is a type of vascular plant belonging to the family Cyathea. The Rough Scaled Tree Fern has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions such as wounds, skin infections, and digestive issues. In traditional herbal medicine, Sphaeropteris squamulata is prepared as an infusion or decoction, and its extracts are used to treat respiratory problems, fever, and other ailments.
